name: Clearbit
description: Monitor Clearbit B2B data enrichment for API access and data handling compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Clearbit at https://dashboard.clearbit.com
2. Go to API → Keys
3. Copy your Secret API Key
4. Enter it below

credentialFields.label: Secret API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Clearbit Dashboard → API → Keys (Secret key)

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Verifies Clearbit API key is active and properly scoped for B2B data enrichment

checks.name: Data Masking
checks.description: Verifies Clearbit data enrichment access is appropriately restricted
